case_number: Constitutional Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 672 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 13.03.2025 Mr. Karim Bux Janweri, Assistant Attorney General >>>>>..<<<<< None present for the petitioner nor any intimation is received. Same was the position on the last two consecutive dates of hearing i.e.12.01.2022 and 31.10.2023. The continuous absence on the part of the petitioner and his Counsel depicts that they are no more interested to proceed with the matter. Accordingly, the instant Constitutional Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge ARBROHI
